sql:
SELECT SUM(gmv) AS total_gmv
FROM dw.ads_funnel_daily
WHERE dt >= DATE '2026-05-13' AND dt <= DATE '2026-05-19'
SELECT SUM(gmv) FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY
SELECT SUM(gmv) FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY

SELECT country, gmv
FROM dw.ads_funnel_daily
WHERE dt = DATE '2026-05-14'  -- 假设当前日期是 2026-05-20，上周为 2026-05-14
ORDER BY gmv DESC
LIMIT 1
SELECT country, SUM(gmv) AS total_gmv FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY country ORDER BY total_gmv DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT country, SUM(gmv) AS total_gmv FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY country ORDER BY total_gmv DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT dt, country, pay_uv
FROM dw.ads_funnel_daily
WHERE dt >= DATE '2026-05-13' AND dt <= DATE '2026-05-19'
SELECT dt, country, pay_uv FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY ORDER BY dt, pay_uv DESC
SELECT dt, country, SUM(pay_uv) AS pay_uv FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY dt, country ORDER BY dt DESC, 3 DESC

SELECT category, SUM(gmv) * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM(gmv) FROM dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= DATE '2026-05-14' AND dt <= DATE '2026-05-20') AS gmv_ratio
FROM dw.ads_funnel_daily
WHERE dt >= DATE '2026-05-14' AND dt <= DATE '2026-05-20'
GROUP BY category
SELECT category, SUM(gmv) * 100.0 / SUM(SUM(gmv)) OVER () AS gmv_ratio FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY category ORDER BY gmv_ratio DESC

SELECT category, SUM(gmv) * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM(gmv) FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY) AS gmv_ratio FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY category ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT 
  dt,
  pay_uv,
  impression_uv,
  pay_uv * 100.0 / impression_uv AS pay_conversion_rate
FROM dw.ads_funnel_daily
WHERE dt >= DATE '2026-05-20' - INTERVAL '7' DAY
ORDER BY dt DESC
LIMIT 7
SELECT SUM(pay_uv) * 100.0 / SUM(impression_uv) AS conversion_rate FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY
SELECT SUM(pay_uv) * 100.0 / SUM(impression_uv) AS conv FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY

err: TrinoUserError(type=USER_ERROR, name=NESTED_WINDOW, message="line 13:22: HAVING clause cannot contain window functions or row pattern measures", query_id=20260521_102436_00119_dxkd8)
sql:
SELECT 
  country,
  SUM(gmv) AS current_gmv,
  LAG(SUM(gmv), 7) OVER (ORDER BY dt) AS previous_gmv
FROM 
  dw.ads_funnel_daily
WHERE 
  dt >= DATE '2026-05-20' - INTERVAL '30' DAY
  AND dt < DATE '2026-05-20'
GROUP BY 
  country
HAVING 
  SUM(gmv) * 100.0 / LAG(SUM(gmv), 7) OVER (ORDER BY dt) < 90

SELECT country FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '30' DAY AND dt < current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY country HAVING SUM(gmv) * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM(gmv) FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY AND dt < current_date) < 90

SELECT country FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '30' DAY AND dt < current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY country HAVING SUM(gmv) * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM(gmv) FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY AND dt < current_date) < 90 ORDER BY 1 ASC

SELECT 
  d.age_group,
  SUM(u.pay_amount) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT u.user_id) AS arpu
FROM 
  dw.dws_user_daily u
JOIN 
  dw.dim_user d
ON 
  u.user_id = d.user_id
WHERE 
  u.dt = current_date
GROUP BY 
  d.age_group

sql: SELECT age_group, SUM(pay_amount) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS arpu FROM iceberg.dw.dws_user_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY age_group ORDER BY arpu DESC
SELECT age_group, SUM(amount) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS arpu FROM dw.dwd_user_action WHERE action_type = 'pay' AND dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY age_group ORDER BY arpu DESC

err: TrinoUserError(type=USER_ERROR, name=COLUMN_NOT_FOUND, message="line 3:7: Column 'gmv' cannot be resolved", query_id=20260521_102452_00129_dxkd8)
sql:
SELECT 
  user_channel, 
  SUM(gmv) * 100.0 / SUM(SUM(gmv)) OVER () AS gmv_ratio
FROM 
  dw.dwd_user_action
WHERE 
  action_type = 'pay'
  AND dt >= DATE '2026-05-20'
  AND dt < DATE '2026-05-27'
GROUP BY 
  user_channel

err: TrinoUserError(type=USER_ERROR, name=COLUMN_NOT_FOUND, message="line 1:26: Column 'gmv' cannot be resolved", query_id=20260521_102454_00130_dxkd8)
sql: SELECT user_channel, SUM(gmv) * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM(gmv) FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY) AS ratio FROM iceberg.dw.dwd_user_action WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY AND action_type = 'pay' GROUP BY user_channel ORDER BY ratio DESC

SELECT channel, SUM(gmv) * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM(gmv) FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY) AS gmv_ratio FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily a JOIN iceberg.dw.dim_user b ON a.country = b.country WHERE a.dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY channel ORDER BY gmv_ratio DESC
